text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way back from a day out with Super
Creek...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We ended up walking quite a lot today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Still full of pep, huh?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
In that case... do you mind tagging along with me
for just a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's go and rest somewhere quiet... What do you
say?
choice_data_list: How about we grab a cup of tea?
How about we grab a cup of tea?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I learned a reeeally refreshing massage
technique recently.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking I'd give it a try on you,
Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, no need to be shy! Let's go somewhere
you can lie down.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm all changed!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that... Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, Creek. You're with your trainer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me, you're still training at this hour?
Well, aren't you a go-getter!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself too hard though. Taking the
time to rest is equally important.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's what I was about to do.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I don't know if it's because I exercised
differently than usual, but my body feels a little
stiff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hm? Let me take a look.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, help me out here, will you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon Super Creek's request, I take a look at
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like there's anything to be worried
about, but it might be good to loosen up her
muscles a bit with a massage.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look serious, but what do you think,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: It might be good to loosen up those muscles.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well! Then it's my time to shine!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You know how to give a massage?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The intricate stuff is best left to the professionals,
but I can manage if you're just looking to loosen
up a little.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll squeeze the pressure points in your feet too.
It's super effective, even if it does hurt a lot.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer. Could you wait here for a bit?
choice_data_list:
Massages are best received after warming up
your body.

Massages are best received after warming up
your body.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer. Could you wait here for a bit?
choice_data_list:
Massages are best received after warming up
your body.

Massages are best received after warming up
your body.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yep, I agree.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Oguri. First, let's hit to the showers
together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Um... But I was going to train again after a short
rest...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's enough for today. Be a darling and come
along, why don't you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We'll be back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without getting a say on the matter, Oguri Cap is
dragged off by Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear some strange noises coming from the
showers shortly thereafter. They vaguely sound
like screams, but... I'm probably just imagining
things.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Now then, Oguri. Lay down over there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll bear the pain if I have to. I just hope there
won't be any lingering discomfort.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! You'll feel all refreshed once I'm done
with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mere seconds later, I hear Oguri Cap shriek as
she gets her feet massaged.
